channel.title: SSscience
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSscience, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists Raise Ecological Concerns About Golden Oyster Mushrooms in Florida Markets
item.description: The golden oyster mushroom is popular in kitchens but poses an ecological risk, with scientists warning it is spreading rapidly through US forests.

item.title: Mysterious Cosmic Explosion May Represent an Entirely New Stellar Phenomenon
item.description: Astronomers are investigating an unusual cosmic event that may signal a previously unknown type of stellar explosion, detected through gravitational wave signals.

item.title: Newly Discovered 132-Million-Year-Old Dinosaur Tracks Challenge Existing Fossil Record
item.description: Well-preserved dinosaur tracks in southern Africa are helping researchers unravel a long-standing gap in the fossil record dating back to massive ancient lava flows.

item.title: 100-Million-Year-Old Snake Fossil with Hind Legs Reshapes Understanding of Evolution
item.description: A fossil snake from roughly 100 million years ago retained hind legs and a cheekbone that has since vanished from the lineage, providing new evolutionary insights.

item.title: NASA Scientist Suggests an Undetected Fifth Force May Exist Within Our Solar System
item.description: Scientists are examining why the universe behaves differently at large versus local scales, with some researchers proposing an unknown fifth fundamental force as a possible explanation.
